title: Casper and Emma Go Hiking
original_title: Karsten og Petra ut på tur
overview: During the autumn holidays, Casper and Emma are going on an exciting camping adventure in the Norwegian wilderness, but when Casper plays matchmaker there is bound to be trouble!
